message:
fix(export): fallback to message timestamps when conversation start time is missing

Add timestamp_to_utc() helper that auto-detects seconds vs milliseconds
precision. When a conversation lacks started_at, the export modal now
falls back to the earliest message timestamp, then to the search hit's
created_at.

Prevents "Unknown date" in exported filenames for sessions with missing
start metadata. Adds comprehensive test coverage with make_hit and
make_view test helpers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
